arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains why Federico Chiesa has barely played for Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot blamed a lack of summer preparations and the "intensity" of the Premier League when explaining the continued absence of Federico Chiesa. Slot confirmed that Chiesa would also sit out Liverpool's Champions League tie away to RB Leipzig on Wednesday night and revealed his theory as to why the former Juve star has struggled to sustain full fitness.
